changeChecks.state-bound: The kit freshly inspected the result fingerprint and bound it to the recorded base and change intent.
changeChecks.config-clean: Active Drupal configuration is clean and exactly represented by tracked configuration.
changeChecks.baseline-route-smoke: The baseline primary and target-required routes remain anonymously reachable without regressions.
changeChecks.repair-regression: The original defect is evidenced, fixed, and protected by a focused regression check.
changeChecks.extension-acceptance: Every declared extension acceptance criterion has concrete result evidence.
changeChecks.drupal-ownership: New public or editorial behavior has an explicit Drupal data, composition, and editor owner.
changeChecks.accessibility-regression: Affected routes have accessibility evidence without a baseline-route regression.
changeChecks.canvas-model: Canvas component and configuration inventory, canonical data ownership, and non-admin save/publish behavior are evidenced.
changeChecks.global-chrome-regression: Verifier-owned desktop/mobile captures prove shared PageRegion, header, navigation, footer, branding, meaningful links, and material layout remain correct on baseline primary routes.
changeChecks.affected-public-output: Changed Drupal-owned content or media appears on every declared affected anonymous route.
changeChecks.editor-workflow: A representative non-admin editor completed the affected Drupal-owned task.
changeChecks.dependency-safety: Dependency audit, database-update status, and affected runtime smoke evidence are recorded.
changeChecks.integration-behavior: Affected integration success, failure, consent, and fallback behavior is evidenced.
changeChecks.managed-media: Affected media remains Drupal-managed with access, metadata, and cache behavior evidenced.
changeChecks.link-resolution: Changed menu and footer links resolve to their intended public behavior.
changeChecks.permission-boundary: Representative allowed and denied non-admin actions match the intended access boundary.
changeChecks.route-regression: Affected aliases, redirects, canonical paths, and negative routes resolve as intended.
changeChecks.seo-regression: Affected public routes render the intended canonical, description, robots, and social metadata.
changeChecks.route-visual-regression: Affected routes retain the intended visual hierarchy and responsive behavior.
changeChecks.conservative-full-regression: Unknown or undeclared impact receives conservative whole-site, editor-boundary, and changed-state evidence.

gates.title: Independent operator run recorded
Production-equivalent Drupal target recorded
Full source route inventory or accepted route boundary
Browser-first source route expansion
Per-route item counts reconciled
Source route drift classified and dispositioned
Target-required routes resolve as intended
Homepage/front-page and alias behavior verified
Public browser-rendered source/target evidence captured
First-fold and brand-defining assets verified
Accepted addressable-surface parity evidence recorded
Structured content ownership evidence recorded
Collection ownership ledger and editor add-a-row evidence recorded
Flexible page composition model declared
Composition owner fidelity checked
Canvas component model fidelity checked when Canvas is used
Recipe discovery and default-owner decisions recorded
Active config matches a non-empty tracked config sync directory
Durable intent is current or treated as advisory
Field-to-public-output behavior verified
Raw embed/source markup and off-road moves inventoried
Independent verifier attempted to falsify completion claims
Live target and packet verifier executed and raw report captured
Human-only open decisions are presented in final handoff
Blind adversarial product review completed against brief and source of truth
Authenticated non-admin editor browser tasks verified
Rendered SEO/social metadata verified or blocked
Launch checklist records accepted evidence or blocked stubs
Maintainer review verdict recorded
